comments: Gallows Corner Flyover Refurbishment - [A12] Eastern Avenue East (All directions) at the junction of [A12] Colchester Road - Various restrictions, to facilitate the refurbishment of Gallows Corner Flyover. Full closure westbound only of the Flyover and westbound A12 and A127. Lane restrictions in place eastbound on A12 and on all approaches to Gallows Corner roundabout to facilitate reconstructing and resurfacing.

State Opening of Parliament  - [A3212] Abingdon Street (Both directions) at the junction of [A3212] Millbank - From Saturday 9th May to Friday 15th May Abingdon Street will be closed for the prebuild for the State opening of Parliament.
On Tuesday 12th May between 02:00 and 07:00 there will be multiple road closures around Whitehall and Parliament Square for the State opening of Parliament rehearsal. 
On Wednesday 13th May between 06:00 and 17:00 there will be multiple road closures around Whitehall and Parliament Square for the State opening of Parliament.
